response.original_title: Why Is My Transaction Pending on Uphold? How to Fix Fast
response.overview: ⚠️ Disclaimer:  📌 Most pending transactions on Uphold resolve ✔️ ➤ [1→833→644→5290] automatically once verification, network confirmations, or security checks are completed. Ensure your account details are correct and fully verified. ✔️ ➤ [1→833→644→5290]  Typical Uphold Pending Timeframes ⏳ Crypto transfers:  A few minutes to several hours after blockchain confirmation 🚀 ➤ [1→833→644→5290] Fiat bank transfers:  1–5 business days depending on bank processing 🏦 ➤ [1→833→644→5290] Card transactions:  Usually instant to 24 hours 💳 ➤ [1→833→644→5290] Security/compliance review:  24 hours to 5 business days 🔍 ➤ [1→833→644→5290]
response.title: Why Is My Transaction Pending on Uphold? How to Fix Fast
